hero.title: AI Job Interviewer
hero.description: Run structured mock interview sessions, record answers, and review progress without requiring AI integration in V1.

differences.title: Prepare with a structured mock interview loop
differences.description: AI Job Interviewer focuses mock interview preparation around sessions, questions, answers, and progress results.

items.title: Session setup
items.description: Define the role, company, experience level, and interview type.

items.title: Answer practice
items.description: Record typed answers against the mock interview questions.

items.title: Progress result
items.description: Score the attempt manually and capture strengths, improvements, and next steps.

feel.title: A focused mock interview workspace
feel.description: The workflow keeps interview setup, questions, answers, and results connected.

items.title: Create the session
items.description: Set the interview target before adding questions.

items.title: Practice answers
items.description: Write responses in a structured preparation flow.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: Use manual scoring to decide what to improve next.

audiences.title: Who uses AI Job Interviewer
audiences.description: Useful for people preparing for job interviews with repeatable mock practice.

items.title: Students
items.description: Prepare for internships and entry-level interviews.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Structure preparation before promotion or career-change interviews.

resourceSection.title: Mock interview essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the interview target, questions, answers, and result summary together.

items.title: Interview session
items.description: Capture role, company, level, type, and target date.

items.title: Question bank
items.description: Add behavioral, technical, role, company, and closing questions.

items.title: Result summary
items.description: Track progress score, strengths, improvements, and next steps.

groupedSection.title: Move from setup to progress review
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for structured mock interview preparation.

items.name: Session
items.description: Create the role and company context.

items.name: Questions
items.description: Add prompts for the interview flow.

items.name: Results
items.description: Score progress and capture next steps.

technicalSection.title: Designed for isolated mock interview data
technicalSection.description: AI Job Interviewer follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Current-user owned sessions, questions, answers, and results.
Responsive route-aware workflow inside the Ansiversa shell.

finalCta.title: Explore AI Job Interviewer
finalCta.description: Open the mock interview workflow to create sessions, questions, answers, and results.
